'''hanoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roachback|roachback]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roachback|roachback]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hanoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæneseth|hæneseth]] || [[word:hænesej|hænesej]] || [[word:hænesesh|hænesesh]] || [[word:hænese|hænese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanonosoth|hanonosoth]] || [[word:hanonosoj|hanonosoj]] || [[word:hanonososh|hanonososh]] || [[word:hanonoso|hanonoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanosoth|hanosoth]] || [[word:hanosoj|hanosoj]] || [[word:hanososh|hanososh]] || [[word:hanoso|hanoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanofsoth|hanofsoth]] || [[word:hanofsoj|hanofsoj]] || [[word:hanofsosh|hanofsosh]] || [[word:hanofsof|hanofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanosotho|hanosotho]] || [[word:hanosojo|hanosojo]] || [[word:hanososho|hanososho]] || [[word:hanosoko|hanosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanosoth|hanosoth]] || [[word:hanosoj|hanosoj]] || [[word:hanososh|hanososh]] || [[word:hanoso|hanoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanosothol|hanosothol]] || [[word:hanosojol|hanosojol]] || [[word:hanososhol|hanososhol]] || [[word:hanosokol|hanosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanosothotho|hanosothotho]] || [[word:hanosojojo|hanosojojo]] || [[word:hanososhosho|hanososhosho]] || [[word:hanosoko|hanosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanosothon|hanosothon]] || [[word:hanosojon|hanosojon]] || [[word:hanososhon|hanososhon]] || [[word:hanosokon|hanosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanosothoro|hanosothoro]] || [[word:hanosojoro|hanosojoro]] || [[word:hanososhoro|hanososhoro]] || [[word:hanosokoro|hanosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
